name: Chicken Piccata Sandy Herzog (Gjts45b)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken breasts to about 1/4 inch thickness.
2. Dredge each chicken breast in flour, salt, and pepper.
3. Fry the chicken quickly in oil until browned on both sides.
4. In the same pan, sauté sliced mushrooms until just cooked through.
5. Add lemon juice and white wine to the pan.
6. Reduce the liquid mixture by about half.
7. Return the chicken breasts to the pan and heat until they are warm.
-Sandy-N.C.
